SELECT members.id AS members_id, members.email AS members_email, members.role AS members_role, members.invite_status AS members_invite_status, members.auto_label_enabled AS members_auto_label_enabled, members.project_id AS members_project_id, members.user_id AS members_user_id, members.created_at AS members_created_at, members.updated_at AS members_updated_at 
FROM members 
WHERE members.project_id = %(project_id_1)s AND members.user_id = %(user_id_1)s 
 LIMIT %(param_1)s
